name: copilot-control-plane
description: See your real GitHub Copilot spend: AI credits, cost and tokens, measured from Copilot's own logs.

commands.title: Copilot Cost Lens: Show Cost Details
Copilot Cost Lens: Reset Session Meter
Copilot Cost Lens: Enable Copilot Token Logging

copilotCostLens.economyModels.description: Model ids/families treated as low-cost. Used to flag when a pricier model is used for light work.

copilotCostLens.reasoningNudgeMinutes.description: Minutes of continuous high/xhigh reasoning before the Cost Explorer tip escalates from a neutral note to an amber nudge.

copilotCostLens.reasoningUrgentMinutes.description: Minutes of continuous high/xhigh reasoning before the Cost Explorer tip escalates to a high-priority (red) warning.

copilotCostLens.modelTipMinCredits.description: Minimum AI credits spent on a price tier (top or mid) before the 'pricey model on light work' tip appears. Keeps trivial usage quiet (1 credit = $0.01).

copilotCostLens.lightOutputTokens.description: Average output (reply) tokens per call below which work is considered 'lightweight'. The pricey-model tip fires only when a top/mid-tier model's average reply is under this size.

copilotCostLens.redactPromptText.description: Hide prompt and reply text in the Priciest-prompts leaderboard and its detail view. When on, prompts are labelled 'Prompt N' and the detail hides the prompt/reply text, while costs and token counts stay visible.
